differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired pneumonia (viral or atypical bacterial)
Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome (ARDS) of infectious etiology
next_steps: Urinalysis to assess for proteinuria and hematuria
Peripheral blood smear examination for atypical lymphocytosis
Maintain strict hemodynamic monitoring with emphasis on vasopressor support rather than diuretics
Consult infectious disease specialist regarding regional endemic pathogens
Serial metabolic panels to monitor for acute kidney injury and electrolyte disturbances
Obtain arterial blood gas and lactate level to guide ventilation and perfusion management
